revision.comment: Bot: mark 2 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:阿智氏]] {{infobox clan | Clan Name = Achi Clan | image = [[File:Achi-jinja, maemiya haiden.jpg|250px]]
Front shrine hall (haiden) of {{ill|Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|ja|阿智神社 (阿智村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|1=Achi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} in {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|qid=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District|1=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, {{ill|Achi, Nagano|en|Achi, Nagano|qid=Q1203279|lt=Achi Village|1=Achi, Nagano}} | Clan Surname = Achi Hōribe | Ancestor = {{ill|Yagokoro Omoikane no Mikoto|ja|八意思兼命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagokoro Omoikane no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagokoro Omoikane no Mikoto|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=オモイカネ|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=オモイカネ|1=Omoikane|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} | Origin = | Clan Founder = | Classification = | Home Territory = {{ill|Achi, Ina District, Shinano Province|ja|信濃国伊那郡阿智|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achi, Ina District, Shinano Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achi, Ina District, Shinano Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Notable Members = | Descendants = }} '''Achi Clan''' (阿智氏, ''Achi-uji'') is a {{ill|Clan|en|Clan|qid=Q211503|lt=clan|1=Clan}} named after "Achi." == Origins == According to the "Tenjin Honki" section of the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}, {{ill|Ame-no-Uwaharu no Mikoto|ja|天表春命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Uwaharu no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Uwaharu no Mikoto|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ウワハル・シタハル|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ウワハル・シタハル|1=Uwaharu and Shitaharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10940723}}, a son of {{ill|Yagokoro Omoikane no Kami|ja|八意思兼神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagokoro Omoikane no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagokoro Omoikane no Kami|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=オモイカネ|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=オモイカネ|1=Omoikane|comment=changed title based on wikidata}}, is cited as the ancestor of the '''Shinano no Achi Hōribe''' (信乃阿智祝部). His brother, {{ill|Ame-no-Shitaharu no Mikoto|ja|天下春命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Shitaharu no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Shitaharu no Mikoto|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ウワハル・シタハル|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=ウワハル・シタハル|1=Uwaharu and Shitaharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10940723}}, is named as the ancestor of the {{ill|Musashi Chichibu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|武蔵秩父国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi Chichibu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Musashi Chichibu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=知々夫国造|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=知々夫国造|1=Chichibu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5096034}}. == History == {{ill|Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|ja|阿智神社 (阿智村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|1=Achi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} preserves a tradition stating that in the fifth year of {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}}, in the first month of spring, {{ill|Yagokoro Omoikane no Mikoto|ja|八意思兼命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagokoro Omoikane no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagokoro Omoikane no Mikoto|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=オモイカネ|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=オモイカネ|1=Omoikane|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} descended into Shinano Province with accompanying deities and enshrined there. == Footnotes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == * {{ill|Toshio Hōga|lt=Toshio Hōga|lt=Toshio Hoga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hoga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hoga|qq=}}, "Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei (Compilation of Ancient Clan Genealogies)," Middle Volume, Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986. == See also == * {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|qid=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}} * {{ill|Koide Clan|ja|小出氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koide Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koide Clan|1=Koide clan (Negi Daibu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11459112}} * {{ill|Afuchi Shrine|ja|安布知神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Afuchi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Afuchi Shrine|1=Afuchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65260948}} * {{ill|Ōmiya Isuzu Shrine|ja|大宮五十鈴神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmiya Isuzu Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmiya Isuzu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500663}} * {{ill|Kazusaburō Shrine|ja|風三郎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazusaburō Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazusaburō Shrine|1=Kazenosaburō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17224071}} * {{ill|Kamimiya Togata Shrine|ja|上宮外縣神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamimiya Togata Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamimiya Togata Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500665}} {{Japanese-history-stub|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|阿智氏|version=90626395|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:阿智氏]] {{wikidata link|Q109594403}} [[Category:Clans of Chūbu Region]] [[Category:Clans of Shinano Province]] [[Category:History of Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Japanese clans]] [[Category:Uji]] [[Category:History of Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:阿智村の歴史]] [[Category:阿智氏]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
